name: AmazonPublisherServicesMobileFuseAdapter
summary: APS MobileFuse Adapter for integrating Amazon Publisher Services with MobileFuse SDK
description:
The Amazon Publisher Services MobileFuse Adapter enables publishers to use APS demand with MobileFuse mediation.
This adapter allows you to integrate Amazon demand into your MobileFuse waterfall.
Learn more at: https://aps.amazon.com/aps/solutions-for-mobile-app-developers/
